title: Chapter 4
content:
Chapter 4: Job

Maria calmly brought the food forward and placed it neatly on the dining table, each their own share before gently lowering herself on her seat. The chair let out a strained squeak, signalling it was barely able to hold her weight.

Denzel caught sight of this

’Chair, you don’t know how much I want to trade places with you. But I’m going to get that ass in my face soon’

Sophia interrupted his thoughts

"We are having bread and soup again!?" Sophia asked with a bored and fed up expression

"Yes, and don’t groan about it. It’s all we can afford, the least you can do is be grateful for the meal" Maria spoke

’My two meals arguing about a meal. Sensational’ Denzel chuckled inwardly

After that episode, they said their blessings and then began to eat.

As they went on with the meal, Denzel listened more than he talked. Through Sophia and Maria’s conversation, the little complaints, remarks about their day, he was able to piece together and understand the state and situation of this family.

They weren’t rich, not even somewhat close.

He thought as much though, from seeing the house and Sophia complaining about eating one meal over and over again.

Maria their mother was the one working to make ends meet. She was the reason they still have this roof over their head and even manage to eat anything at all. She was the core, but Sophia contributed too not as much but she had a little job going on for her.

’This pussy Denzel didnt contribute one bit to the income of this family. He just stays at home all day and leaves his women to do all the work for him, disgusting’

’I’ll have to change that narrative now that I’m the one in control of this body’

Amidst it all, Denzel sat quietly with a faint smile resting on his lips

His eyes glanced across the two women in front of him

’Two harem members, all mine for the taking. Who will I fuck first’ he thought as his smile deepend slightly

Sophia looked his direction since he’s been quiet all this time

"Denzel, what’s with that cheeky and disgusting smile. It gives me the creeps" Sophia spoke to him

’Damn it, i didn’t think my intent showed so clearly’

"It’s nothing, I’m just happy to see you two again" Denzel tried to brush her off

"You’ve been seeing us for all your life now, why are you so happy about it now. Creepy Denzel"

"Sophia! Stop teasing your brother like that" Maria cautioned Sophia

"I’m sorry, mom. I was just playing with him"

"Now Denzel, you’ve not been talking since you came to the dining table and you looked so lost in your thoughts. What’s worrying you so much" Maria asked with concern

’Mistake number one, I made them worry about me. None of these people know that I’m a different person...I have to show them that I’m the man of the house now’

’None of them know and they still believe... well then, if I say this now I wonder what effect it would bring. Since it’s something they would never expect to hear from old Denzel’

’No reason to think about it, I just have to say it’

"Mom"

The word felt strange and unfamiliar in his mouth. He still feels weird calling her that since technically speaking she really isn’t his mother.

Maria immediately adjusted her seating position and faced him directly her milk swollen tits jiggling along with her about to break loose from the prison called a dress

Denzel let out a small awkward chuckle before speaking again "I want to get a job"

The two women were in shock, even Sophia sat well and looked at him in disbelief.

’Wow, I can get a clear image of how they saw old Denzel now with these reactions’

Maria was the first to speak... "A job?"

"Yes" he continued, more firmly this time

"It’s just that I’ve been thinking, you both have jobs that help sustain this family and I don’t do anything to contribute to that. So I thought it would be best if I also got a job"

They both stared at him still in utter shock and disbelief

Then slowly, Maria added "I suppose that wouldn’t be bad if you put it thay way"

"Little Denzel has finally grown some balls" Sophia chuckled

’Yes, they sure are big and in a short while from know you’ll be on your knees getting throat fucked by my balls and cock’

"Sophia, language. But Denzel why did you decide to change your mind now. You said you didnt want to be involved in things like this" Maria continued

’Damn, I know I completely went out of character, what do I do now’

Before the tension could settle, Sophia slammed her hands on the table while rising from her sits.

Her boobs jiggling and swaying with that motion. One of the straps of her dress pulled closer to her arm just enough not to fall of, exposing more of her massive tits

"This is something new, mom. Lets not pressure him before he changes his mind again. If Denzel starts working, since men get paid more we’ll be able to afford a variety of meals"

"Oh, I guess you are right. At the end of the day it’s all about food for your Sophia" Maria’s voice lighter now that she has considered it

Then she added "I probably should agree before you end up changing your mind. If you can keep up with a job then it would be a splendid idea"

"Now, Sophia you will probably be able to eat the meals you want"

Amidst it all, Denzel sat quietly with a little unnoticeable grin on his face.

His eyes glancing at the both of them, the two beautiful goddess like women in front of him.

’Two harem members...I can’t wait much longer. I have to decide fast which one I’ll fuck first’

~~~
